text.title: Unattended Upgrades Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Unattended Upgrades end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: choose-window
step.action: Pick reboot window with lowest traffic.

step.name: override-timer
step.action: Drop-in apt-daily-upgrade.timer with OnCalendar matching window.

step.name: install-reboot-check
step.action: Install check-reboot-required.sh in daily cron with tg-send alert.
step.decision-gate: If mail/tg alert path not configured, block — silent reboots unacceptable.
